arguments.command:
# index.css — update gold accent tokens to Dusk Blue
# Light mode: --accent (gold 43 63% 47%) → Dusk Blue (215 30% 33%)
# Dark mode: --primary (gold) → Off-White (60 1% 99%); --accent → Dusk
sed -i \
  -e 's/--accent: 43 63% 47%;/--accent: 215 30% 33%;/g' \
  -e 's/--accent-foreground: 215 91% 14%;/--accent-foreground: 60 1% 99%;/g' \
  -e 's/\/\* Gold \*\//\/\* Dusk Blue \*\//g' \
  -e 's/--chart-1: 43 63% 47%;           \/\* Dusk Blue \*\//--chart-1: 215 30% 33%;           \/\* Dusk Blue \*\//g' \
  artifacts/clientum/src/index.css

# Dark mode specific: primary was gold, now use Dusk
# Find and replace only in .dark block
python3 -c "
import re
with open('artifacts/clientum/src/index.css', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# In dark mode, primary was gold → change to Off-White as primary highlight
# ring was gold → change to Prussian
dark_section = re.search(r'(/\* DARK MODE \*/\n\.dark \{)(.*?)(^})', content, re.DOTALL | re.MULTILINE)
if dark_section:
    dark_content = dark_section.group(2)
    dark_content = dark_content.replace('--primary: 43 63% 47%;', '--primary: 215 30% 33%;')
    dark_content = dark_content.replace('--primary-foreground: 215 91% 10%;', '--primary-foreground: 60 1% 99%;')
    dark_content = dark_content.replace('--ring: 43 63% 47%;              /* Gold */', '--ring: 215 91% 14%;             /* Prussian Blue */')
    dark_content = dark_content.replace('--sidebar-primary: 43 63% 47%;', '--sidebar-primary: 215 30% 33%;')
    dark_content = dark_content.replace('--sidebar-ring: 43 63% 47%;', '--sidebar-ring: 215 91% 14%;')
    # Replace accent in dark too (already handled by sed above but make sure foreground is right)
    dark_content = dark_content.replace('--accent-foreground: 215 91% 10%;', '--accent-foreground: 60 1% 99%;')
    content = content[:dark_section.start(2)] + dark_content + content[dark_section.end(2):]
    with open('artifacts/clientum/src/index.css', 'w') as f:
        f.write(content)
    print('Dark mode tokens updated')
else:
    print('Dark section not found')
"
echo "index.css done"
arguments.description: Update gold accent CSS tokens to Dusk Blue in index.css
